capture_method: release-enablement skill — Chrome MCP shadow-DOM walker
notes: Article IDs were discovered by walking the sidebar/body of captured pages.
Status 'captured' = .md file present in articles/. Status 'pending' = ID known, body not yet fetched.
Status 'discovered_no_id' = title seen in a captured article's child list but its ID hasn't been resolved yet.
